notes:
Farsight patch

- Version 2.1.29.
- Added chat channel tabs for All, Party, Guild, and named private-message conversations.
- Added close buttons for private-message tabs and prevented slash commands from creating fake PM tabs.
- Moved FPS and ping back to the bottom-left as one stacked in-game box.
- Added an optional setting to focus a character client when clicking its Farsight character card.
- Improved character-card click focusing so the full card focuses the client except when clicking card buttons.
- Cleaned up character card and in-game chat state handling.
